body: Elena, great catching up with you at the [Breakthrough Energy](orgs/breakthrough-energy) summit last week — your panel on grid-scale storage financing was genuinely one of the best sessions I've seen in a while. I've been thinking more about the deal you flagged afterward, the Series A in the long-duration storage space, and I think there could be a real fit with what we're building out at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) on the climate infrastructure side. We're actively deploying at that stage and have been specifically hunting for assets with contracted offtake or clear utility partnerships, which from what you described sounds like it may already be in place here. Would love to get on a call this week or next to hear the full picture and see if it makes sense to come in alongside you. Does Thursday or Friday work on your end?
